title: Voltage Drop Calculator - Calculate Wire Voltage Drop
description: Free voltage drop calculator. Calculate voltage drop in electrical wiring based on wire gauge, length, and current load.
keywords: voltage drop calculator, wire voltage drop, electrical calculator, cable voltage drop
intro: Calculate voltage drop in electrical wiring. Enter wire gauge, length, current, and voltage to determine if your wiring is adequate.

faq.a: NEC recommends no more than 3% voltage drop for branch circuits and 5% total (feeder + branch). For a 120V circuit, that's 3.6V max on a branch.
Use thicker wire (lower AWG), shorten the wire run, or reduce the current load. Doubling wire size cuts voltage drop in half.
